sect1.title: ISOWeekDate

row.entry: A date value in the Date_t format.
Optional BOOLEAN. If TRUE, returns the ISO week date in extended form (e.g., 2018-W23-7). If FALSE (default), returns compact form (e.g., 2018W237).
ISOWeekDate returns a STRING representing the ISO-8601 week date for the given date.

sect1.para: The ISOWeekDate function returns the ISO-8601 week date for the given date, in either extended or compact form. This is an ISO-8601 implementation of computing week numbers ("week dates").
